title: Body

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The bill would require chatbot operators to implement critical safeguards to protect users from the addictive aspects of AI chatbots.",
    "AI chatbots lack the regulation necessary to ensure vulnerable users such as children are properly protected from the possible dangers.",
    "Emotional companion chatbots targeting minors and vulnerable populations can have dangerous outcomes.",
    "Companion chatbot companies use techniques to create increasing user engagement, which leads to dependency and addiction in children and youth.",
    "The population risk of suicide for minors increased significantly with social media addiction, and companion chatbots appear to be equally or more addictive.",
    "There is solid evidence that companion chatbots can create dependency similar to social media, raising public health concerns."
  ]
}
```
